name: Apple Pork Chops
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the pork chops using melted pork fat trimmed from the meat and 1 tablespoon butter.
- Those concerned about their fat intake may choose to use corn oil or some other vegetable oil instead of pork fat.
2. Season the pork chops to taste and set them on a hot platter. Keep warm.
3. Slice the apples into half-inch thick slices and add them to the pan with 1 tablespoon butter, sugar, and a few pinches of cinnamon or cloves.
4. Cook the apple slices over medium heat for about 10 minutes, turning occasionally until some of the apples are browned.
5. Arrange the cooked apple slices around the pork chops and serve. Serves: 4-6
